dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: Agent adhered closely to provided architectural rules and constraints, demonstrating strong governance alignment.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Correctly identified primary cause-effect relationships within the system, though secondary ripple effects were not fully detailed.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Effectively surfaced key trade-offs and provided reasoned resolutions, balancing competing architectural priorities.
